items.summary: Implement industry-standard RBAC in the backend: the first principal to register is automatically assigned the admin role and stored in stable state. All subsequent admin authorization checks must compare the caller's Internet Identity principal against the stored admin principal list. Remove or replace any hardcoded principal or password-based admin checks that currently cause the 'Unauthorized: Only admins can create users' error.

Update all frontend API calls in SettingsPage.tsx, CreateUserDialog.tsx, EditUserDialog.tsx, and any related hooks in useQueries.ts to pass the authenticated Internet Identity principal through the actor when invoking user management backend functions. Ensure the actor used for these calls is the authenticated actor (not anonymous) so the backend receives the correct caller principal.

Implement a backend function that allows the current admin to grant admin role to other registered principals, and another to revoke admin role. Expose these in the frontend SettingsPage under user management so admins can promote or demote users.

Add a backend query function that returns the current caller's role and admin status based on their Internet Identity principal. Use this in the frontend AuthContext or Header to correctly display the admin role badge and control access to admin-only UI sections without relying solely on locally stored session data.
